prompt:
Editorial single-stat poster, vertical 4:5 composition (1080x1350), premium minimal aesthetic inspired by Function Health and Aesop visual restraint.

Background: deep forest green #000F08, solid. A very subtle radial gradient wash of #2D7A5C at only 8% opacity emanates softly from the center (suggesting solar warmth without any literal sun iconography).

Centered vertical layout, generous negative space:

1. LARGE STAT (centered, upper-middle, occupying ~45% of canvas height): the text "47%" rendered in DM Sans Light weight 300, approximately 180px tall, kerning -0.04em, color gold #C89136. The number lives directly in the negative space — NO card, NO box, NO container, NO drop shadow, NO glow.

2. LABEL (directly below the stat, centered, two lines): 
Line 1: "dos brasileiros têm deficiência de vitamina D." in DM Sans Light 300, 22px, off-white #f8fffc.
Line 2: "Mesmo no trópico." in Georgia italic, 22px, off-white #f8fffc.
Line-height 1.4, both lines centered.

3. MICRO-SOURCE (footer above logo area, centered): "FONTE — SOCIEDADE BRASILEIRA DE ENDOCRINOLOGIA E METABOLOGIA (SBEM)" in DM Sans Regular 400, 11px, UPPERCASE, letter-spacing +0.08em, off-white #f8fffc at 50% opacity.

4. RESERVE clean empty space at the BOTTOM-CENTER for a logo to be overlaid later — approximately 28% of canvas width, with 5% padding from the bottom edge. Leave this area completely empty (just the forest background). DO NOT generate any logo, wordmark, or text in this reserved space.

Text must render with perfect typography: Portuguese diacritics correct, no spelling errors, sharp anti-aliasing.

ABSOLUTELY NO: sun icon, sun rays, light rays, lightning bolt, water drop, pill, capsule, supplement bottle, bar chart, pie chart, graph, infographic elements, person, skin, hand, body part, drop shadow on the number, box/card/container around the stat, rainbow gradient, saturated colors beyond the specified gold, decorative flourish, emoji, sparkle, halftone, grain texture, vignette frame.
notes: Single-stat editorial poster. Logo overlay added by post-process step at bottom-center, 28% width, 5% bottom padding.
